case_title: ALBINA KHAZAN VS. TDR, INC DBA THREE DAY RULE, INC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED MAY-11-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TDR SERVICES GROUP, INC.

DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME FROM: TDR, INC (DBA THREE DAY RULE, INC) TO: TDR SERVICES GROUP INC, & CORRECT STREET ADDRESS. CHANGE AMOUNT OF CLAIM AND THE NAME OF THE AGENT OF PROCESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHAZAN, ALBINA
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 5/20/22. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO TDR, INC-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: LEGAL INC. REGISTERED AGENTS, INC.)_ FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHAZAN, ALBINA AS TO DEFENDANT TDR SERVICES GROUP, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY KHAZAN, ALBINA AS TO DEFENDANT TDR SERVICES GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-27-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALBINA KHAZAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TDR, INC., DBA THREE DAY RULE, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALBINA KHAZAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TDR, INC DBA THREE DAY RULE, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRITNEY HOSE, NATIONAL VIP MATCHMAKER AT THREE DAY RULE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHAZAN, ALBINA AS TO DEFENDANT TDR SERVICES GROUP, INC.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-25-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-27-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REMARK: RECD CORRESPONDENCE FROM LEGAL INC STATING NO RECORD OF COMPANY TDR, INC IN SYSTEM OR CA SECRETARY OF STATE.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY KHAZAN, ALBINA AS TO DEFENDANT TDR SERVICES GROUP, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-13-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WILL AMEND HER CLAIM AMENDING THE NAMED DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF ALBINA KHAZAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TDR INC., DBA THREE DAY RULE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-26-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TDR SERVICES GROUP, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TDR SERVICES GROUP, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHAZAN, ALBINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TDR SERVICES GROUP, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
